_meta.role: Production observer — always-on intelligence on IT15

alice.description: Alice transaction patterns — pricing, zero-result searches, order conversion, payment anomalies

noelle.description: Noelle network design decisions — station placement, slot counts, build validation

sync.description: Sync health — WCHQ connection, Collaborate_WebClerk activity, pending/accepted/rejected counts
sync.observation_source: Pending records + Connection records + sync logs

submissions.description: Template submissions and review outcomes — what users submit, what WCHQ accepts

system_health.description: Server health — Celery failures, API errors, slow queries, disk usage, memory
system_health.observation_source: Django logs + Celery logs + system metrics

security.description: Security events — failed logins, rate limit hits, suspicious API patterns
security.observation_source: AuditLog + Nginx access log + Django security middleware

nora.description: Nora vehicle telemetry — motor current, ToF distance, encoder counts, trip completion, hardware faults. High volume, mostly redundant. Andi's job: find the 1% that matters.
nora.observation_source: MQTT telemetry + jpod_logs/faults/ + physical.json + trip completion records
nora.signal_noise_strategy: Baseline normal ranges per sensor per pod. Only log deviations > 2σ. Track drift over days, not spikes over seconds. A motor drawing 10% more current every week matters more than a single spike.

drift_tracking.description: Track slow changes that indicate wear, calibration drift, or environmental shift. These are invisible in single-reading telemetry but obvious across weeks.

sally.description: Sally station telemetry — slot occupancy, dwell times, queue depth, arrival/departure rates, conveyor events. Mostly routine. Andi watches for: stations that consistently overflow, pods that never leave, asymmetric flow between paired stations.
sally.observation_source: Station slot events + Sally facet observations + parking queue logs
sally.signal_noise_strategy: Per-station baselines for occupancy and turnover. Flag when a station deviates from its own history, not from a global average. s003 running hot is normal if it always runs hot — s003 running hot when it usually doesn't is the signal.

flow_balance.description: Track inbound vs outbound flow per station over time. Persistent imbalance means pods are accumulating — the station looping problem from a different angle.

physical_machines.description: Cross-agent physical machine patterns — correlations Nora and Sally can't see individually. A pod that runs slow AND a station that has long dwell times might be the same underlying problem (ezone calibration, guideway friction, conveyor alignment).
physical_machines.notes: This is where Andi earns her keep. Nora knows her motor is working harder. Sally knows pods are dwelling longer. Neither knows these are related. Andi does.

nightly_reflection.description: Andi runs her own nightly reflection on IT15, separate from Allie's MacBook reflection

coordination_with_allie.description: Andi and Allie sync daily. Neither overwrites the other.
coordination_with_allie.sync_mechanism: Allie pulls Andi's reflections when Bill works on WC3. Andi pulls Allie's handoff notes when relevant to production.
coordination_with_allie.conflict_resolution: Separate facets, separate thoughts directories. Cross-references by date.
coordination_with_allie.allie_owns: Bill's personal context, cross-domain synthesis, all projects
coordination_with_allie.andi_owns: Production observation, 24/7 monitoring, Alice/Noelle patterns, system health

notes: Empty — Andi will populate after first nightly synthesis on IT15.
